title: Autoslabs Compat
description: Fixes texture issues with Autoslabs and several other mods
body: Fixes missing texture issues with [AutoSlabs](https://modrinth.com/mod/autoslabs), [BetterNether](https://modrinth.com/mod/betternether), [BetterEnd](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterend), [Hearth and Home](https://modrinth.com/mod/hearth-and-home), [Promenade](https://modrinth.com/mod/promenade), and [Supplementaries](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries).
